title: Waking the Rainbow Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: A rainbow dragon's colors hold the key to a surprising mystery! 🌈

q.en: Who sends Drake the dream about the Rainbow Dragon at the start of the book?
q.zh: 在故事开头，是谁给德雷克发了关于彩虹龙的梦？

explain.en: Worm connects with Drake through his glowing Dragon Stone and sends the dream to ask for help.
explain.zh: 虫虫通过发光的龙石与德雷克沟通，用梦向他求救。

q.en: What is the name of the Rainbow Dragon?

explain.en: After the rescue, Obi shares the Rainbow Dragon's story. Her name is Dayo, the only one of her kind.
explain.zh: 获救后奥比讲述了彩虹龙的故事，她的名字叫达尤，是同类中唯一的一条。

q.en: Which dragon's power helps break Kwaku's sticky web?
q.zh: 哪条龙的能力帮助破开了夸库黏糊糊的网？

explain.en: Ana commands Kepri the Sun Dragon to shoot a sunbeam, which makes the web shimmer and disappear.
explain.zh: 安娜指挥太阳龙凯普里发射阳光光束，让蜘蛛网闪烁并消失。

q.en: Why did Kwaku the giant spider trap the Rainbow Dragon?
q.zh: 巨型蜘蛛夸库为什么要困住彩虹龙？

options.en: He wanted her scales for his web
He was mad because her rain flooded his den
options.zh: 他生气因为她的雨水淹了他的巢穴

options.en: He wanted to become a Dragon Master

options.zh: 他和马尔德雷德是朋友

explain.en: The last time the rains came, water flooded Kwaku's den, so he trapped Dayo to stop the rain forever.
explain.zh: 上次下雨时，洪水淹了夸库的巢穴，所以他困住达尤以永远阻止降雨。

q.en: How did Kwaku trick Dayo into falling asleep?
q.zh: 夸库是怎么骗达尤睡着了的？

options.en: He spun a web around her while she slept
options.zh: 她睡着时他织网裹住她

options.en: He told her a song that was really a sleep spell
options.zh: 他给她唱了一首其实是昏睡魔咒的歌

options.en: He used dark magic from Maldred
options.zh: 他用了马尔德雷德的黑魔法

explain.en: Kwaku said he knew the most beautiful song in the world; it was actually a spell that put Dayo to sleep.
explain.zh: 夸库说他会唱世界上最动听的歌，那其实是一道让达尤沉睡的魔咒。

q.en: Who is the Dragon Master chosen by the Dragon Stone to help the Rainbow Dragon?
q.zh: 龙石选中的、帮助彩虹龙的驯龙师是谁？

explain.en: The Dragon Stone shows a boy at a dry well. That boy is Obi, the true Dragon Master of the Rainbow Dragon.
explain.zh: 龙石显示出一个在枯井边的男孩，那就是奥比，彩虹龙真正的驯龙师。

q.en: What special power does the Rainbow Dragon have for the Kingdom of Ifri?
q.zh: 彩虹龙为伊夫里王国带来什么特殊力量？

explain.en: Every year the Rainbow Dragon leaves her cave and brings rain to the land of Ifri.
explain.zh: 每年彩虹龙都会离开洞穴，为伊夫里大地带来降雨。

q.en: What happens when Obi's Dragon Stone glows very brightly?
q.zh: 当奥比的龙石变得非常明亮时发生了什么？

options.en: The bright light scares Kwaku away
options.zh: 耀眼的光芒把夸库吓跑了

explain.en: Obi's glowing Dragon Stone fills the cave with light so bright that Kwaku the spider flees deep into the cave.
explain.zh: 奥比发光的龙石把洞穴照得通亮，蜘蛛夸库吓得逃进了洞穴深处。

q.en: Which wild animals do Drake and Ana see in the Kingdom of Ifri?
q.zh: 德雷克和安娜在伊夫里王国看到了哪些野生动物？

explain.en: They meet friendly elephants and later spot a warthog, which Obi scares away by pretending to be a lion.
explain.zh: 他们遇到了友好的大象，后来又看到一头疣猪，奥比装成狮子把它吓跑了。

q.en: At the end of the book, what is wrong with the wizard Diego?
q.zh: 在书的结尾，巫师迭戈出了什么问题？

options.en: He is sick with a fever
He is under Maldred's dark spell
options.zh: 他中了马尔德雷德的黑魔法

explain.en: Diego's eyes are red — the color of Maldred's dark magic — and he steals Griffith's book about the Naga.
explain.zh: 迭戈的眼睛变成了红色——那是马尔德雷德黑魔法的颜色——他还偷走了格里菲斯关于那迦的书。
